Yasmin Abdel Aziz is a Full Stack Java Developer with contact information including email, phone number, GitHub, LinkedIn, and personal website.

Yasmin Abdel Aziz completed her education with an M.C.A in January 2018 from Pune University, a B.C.A in January 2015 from Amravati University, an H.S.C in January 2012 from Amravati University, and an S.S.C in January 2010 from Amravati University.
The listed IDEs and tools are Eclipse, Spring Tool Suite, NetBeans, Sublime Text, and Atom.
The supported operating systems are Windows XP, 7, 8, and 10.
From June 2020 to March 2021, Yasmin Abdel Aziz worked as a Java Developer at Salcluster Technologies in Cairo, Egypt, developing projects using Java Servlet, JSP, Ajax, and other web technologies.

From January 2020 to May 2020, Yasmin Abdel Aziz was a Software Engineer at OmegaSoft Technologies Pvt. Ltd. in Giza, Egypt, developing projects with Java Spring Hibernate, AngularJs, and other technologies, and implementing applications following MVC Architecture.

Yasmin Abdel Aziz developed several projects, including GST And Sales Billing Softwares (1.5 months), Dinman News Website (1 month), Agri Management Website (1.5 months), and Employment Times (4 months), utilizing Java, JavaScript, JQuery, Ajax, and MySQL.
Yasmin Abdel Aziz holds Java Developer and Java certificates from Unanth Technical Institute and SoloLearn, respectively, and a Command Line Crash Course certificate from Udemy.
Yasmin Abdel Aziz possesses skills in Programming Languages like Java (Servlet, JSP, Spring Boot) and Web Technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, JavaScript, JQuery, Ajax, and AngularJS.

Yasmin Abdel Aziz is a driven and versatile Full Stack Java Developer, steadily building a career grounded in solid academic foundations and practical experience. Her journey began with a strong educational base – an M.C.A from Pune University following a B.C.A and foundational schooling from Amravati University – equipping her with a comprehensive understanding of computer applications. 

She quickly translated this knowledge into professional roles, first as a Software Engineer at OmegaSoft Technologies in Giza, Egypt, where she honed her skills in Java Spring, Hibernate, and AngularJS, embracing the principles of MVC architecture. This was followed by a position as a Java Developer at Salcluster Technologies in Cairo, deepening her expertise with Java Servlet, JSP, and Ajax. 

Yasmin isn’t simply an implementer of existing solutions; she’s a builder. Her portfolio showcases a range of projects – from practical applications like GST and Sales Billing Software to dynamic web platforms like the Dinman News Website, an Agri Management Website, and Employment Times – all brought to life using Java, JavaScript, JQuery, Ajax, and MySQL. 

A dedicated learner, Yasmin continuously expands her skillset, evidenced by certifications in Java development from Unanth Technical Institute and SoloLearn, alongside a Udemy course in Command Line proficiency. She’s fluent in a modern web technology stack, encompassing Java (including Spring Boot), HTML5, CSS3, Bootstrap, and JavaScript, making her a well-rounded and capable developer. You can reach her via email at EMAIL.COM or by phone at +20 100 123 4567, and find her work showcased on GitHub and LinkedIn, as well as her personal website.
